scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => Promise.all(['.turbo', 'coverage', 'dist', 'playwright-report', 'test-results'].map(path => fs.rm(path, { force: true, recursive: true }))))"
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: node -e "console.log('Integration test scaffolding lands in skeeditor-2i1i.')"
scripts.test:unit: node -e "console.log('Unit test scaffolding lands in skeeditor-2i1i.')"
